mapper.insert: insert into attendance(student_id, attendance_date, status, reason) values(#{studentId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{status}, #{reason})
mapper.update: update attendance set student_id = #{studentId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}, status = #{status}, reason = #{reason} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select a.id, a.student_id as studentId, stu.name as studentName, a.attendance_date as attendanceDate, a.status, a.reason from attendance a left join student stu on a.student_id = stu.id
